channel.title: Indonesian Runners Japan
channel.description: Recent content on Indonesian Runners Japan

item.title: About IRJ
item.description: Indonesian Runners Japan (IRJ) started from a desire to unite runners from Indonesia who are living in Japan. Whether you are a casual runner looking to break a sweat on weekends, or a marathoner aiming for a podium finish or a Personal Best, this community is a place to support each other, share training routes, and plan participations in various races across Japan.

item.title: IRJ Board
item.description: Here is the board of Indonesian Runners Japan: Founder / Head: Ichiro Nathanael Wiratma Vice Head: (To be filled) Secretary: (To be filled)

item.title: Regional Branches
item.description: Please join the branch closest to your residence: IRJ Kanto (Tokyo, Yokohama) IRJ Kansai (Osaka, Kyoto, Kobe) IRJ Chubu (Nagoya) IRJ Kyushu IRJ Chugoku IRJ Hokkaido IRJ Tohoku-Okinawa IRJ Shikoku IRJ She Runs (Women only) Ex-Japan Runners (Alumni)

item.title: Upcoming Events
item.description: Here are some upcoming running events that IRJ members will participate in: April 5, 2026: Higashiyodogawa 5K Race October 2026: Batik Run
